response:
* zombo the clown ghost devil emerges from a tiny car to kidnap shaggy while defying all laws of physics and gravity
* fred mistakes jolly jipner for a famous turnip actor named bruce willis causing an angry shouting match about surnames
* velma excitedly declares that the door opens stuff which is the most obvious observation ever made in history
* red herring appears to take the blame for the ghost crime only to get stuck in a popcorn machine and vanish
* the gang questions why a roller coaster called monster mountain exists in a town named coolsville which makes no sense
* daphne reminds shaggy and scooby that they cannot ride the ride unless they stop the ghost despite the plot holes
* joey jipner is revealed as the culprit who used clown props to scare his family for money and control
